description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push events with any tag. For a specific repository owner, set up an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, installs .NET Core 3.1.300 and .NET 5.0.100, and Node.js 10.x. Then, package and publish a NuGet package using a specific version from Git tags, and push it to NuGet.org using a secret API key.
